name: Beholder Tyrant

headline.name: Petrify Gaze
headline.summary: In the boss fight, a stone-eye beam periodically locks adventurers in place.

mechanics.text: Anti-Magic Aura — each day, marks rooms that silence all class abilities inside.

flavorText: All seeing. All silencing. Whatever the eye lingers on, the world forgets how to move.

name: Demon Lord

headline.name: Sacrifice Pact
headline.summary: Once per day, burn a minion (often a free imp) to instakill a random adventurer.

mechanics.text: Hellgate — a portal in the boss room spawns free Imps every dawn. They roam the dungeon and don't count toward your minion cap.

flavorText: Every contract is signed in someone else's blood. The Pact decides whose.

name: Predator Myconid

headline.name: Spore Network
headline.summary: Every third day, corridors fill with toxic spores that damage anyone inside.

mechanics.text: Corpse Bloom — dead adventurers rot into fungal corpses that poison on contact, then bloom into free Vinekin sprouts.

flavorText: Patient soil keeps every footstep. Eventually it grows tired of them.

name: Dark Wraith

headline.name: Fear Meter
headline.summary: Adventurers gain fear from horrors in your dungeon. Enough fear makes them flee, turn on each other, or drop dead.

mechanics.text: Haunting — dead adventurers leave free Ghosts that haunt their room and phase through walls to attack.

flavorText: The bravest die first. The cowards live just long enough to be useful.

name: Gnoll Alpha

headline.name: Hunter's Pack
headline.summary: Free gnolls live in your boss room and respawn each dawn. They don't count toward your minion cap.

mechanics.text: Bloodlust — every kill in your dungeon stacks ATK on every gnoll for the day.

flavorText: First blood feeds the second. By dusk the teeth are sharper than the gates.

name: Earth Golem

headline.name: Living Architecture
headline.summary: Every room you place permanently grows the boss's HP and DEF.

mechanics.text: Earthquake — once per day, slam a room. Damage scales with how many rooms you've built.

flavorText: Stone keeps every promise. Flesh keeps trying to.

name: Elder Lich

headline.name: The Withering
headline.summary: Every death in your dungeon banks Soul Essence — the Lich's lifeline, the fuel for your active Channel Souls ability, and the reserve it carries into the throne fight.

mechanics.text: Channel Souls — during the day, spend essence on a target room: blast, drain, wither, then (late acts) cage everyone inside. Room-wide, so it scales with the crowd.
Soul Harvest — the Lich slowly regenerates while it holds essence; hoard for a deadlier final fight or spend now for kill pressure.

flavorText: It does not raise the dead — it drinks them. Every soul your halls collect makes the withering deeper.

name: Serpent Captain

headline.name: Camouflage
headline.summary: Your minions and traps are invisible until each strikes for the first time.

mechanics.text: Venom Stack — Lizardman attacks stack poison that lingers for the rest of the run.

flavorText: What the eye doesn't see, the fang still finds.

name: Orc Veteran

headline.name: Trophy Hunter
headline.summary: Every hero class your dungeon kills arms the Veteran with their weapon — his throne-fight arsenal grows over the run and sharpens with repeat kills.

mechanics.text: Warband — orcs in the same room buff each other's ATK and DEF, and each loots permanent ATK per kill.
Mastery (Act III+) — his most-claimed trophy radiates a dungeon-wide boon (Blade→minion ATK, Heavy→minion DEF, Arcane→traps recharge, Hunter→minion range, Faith→boss regen).

flavorText: He wears the realm's champions as trophies. Every hero you feed him teaches the axe a new way to kill.

name: Vampire Sovereign

headline.name: Charm
headline.summary: Each dawn, one adventurer is charmed and rises as a Thrall hunting their former party.

mechanics.text: Blood Tax — damage your minions deal heals the boss.

flavorText: Hospitality is a weapon. So are most things, in the right hands.

name: Succubus Queen

headline.name: Bat-Form Seduction
headline.summary: Shapeshift to a bat-swarm and charm an adventurer (once per boss level per day). They turn on their party until an ally dies.

mechanics.text: Doppelgänger — the Queen hides among illusory duplicates that the party must shatter to land a real hit.

flavorText: She does not need a key. Doors are for the unloved.

name: Slime King
tagline: Splits when struck, leaks little ones

headline.name: Absorb & Excrete
headline.summary: Dead minions get swallowed by the King — he excretes a random Goopling that waddles back to its post (+2 boss HP each).

mechanics.text: Mitosis — at half HP, the King splits into two smaller slimes that each have their own health. They split again at half. Kill every last blob to win.

flavorText: There is no killing it. There is only making more of it.
description: Splits when struck, leaks little ones
